title: Fragment Of A Sonnet. Farewell To North Devon.
content:
Where man's profane and tainting hand
    Nature's primaeval loveliness has marred,
    And some few souls of the high bliss debarred
    Which else obey her powerful command;
    ...mountain piles
    That load in grandeur Cambria's emerald vales.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment Of A Sonnet. Farewell To North Devon."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
